text.title: Generative UI Design Spec Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the generative-ui-design methodology end-to-end.

step.name: define-ui-grammar
step.action: Author the component grammar (JSON Schema) the LLM may emit — restricts to known components + safe props.
step.decision-gate: If grammar admits arbitrary HTML, REJECT — restrict to known components.

step.name: design-deterministic-fallback
step.action: Build a static fallback layout that covers ≥80% of user intents without LLM call.
step.decision-gate: If fallback fails on majority intents, the product is not generative-UI-ready.

step.name: write-safety-rules
step.action: Encode 'never emit' rules: forbidden copy, forbidden image sources, forbidden PII echoes.

step.name: build-eval-suite
step.action: ≥30 cases across happy, adversarial, minority strata. Add rubric per stratum.
